meaning: vt.用大字体书写,吸引,占用,使全神贯注,独占
examples: To write or print a final copy of; engross.
But self, though it would intrude, could not engross her.
To occupy the full attention, interest, or time of; engross.
The things that captivate, engross, and entertain us, all have an element of surprise.
Although working as a serial entrepreneur is rewarding, you must be willing to engross yourself in different industries with different people and different cultures.
